Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 423}There's a bar by the gang spot with the best cocktails around.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 423}But now they're looking into making non-alcoholic cocktails.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 423}It used to be a bar where adults could drink in peace... Now it'll be swarming with kids.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 423}There's a mahjong parlor by the gang spot, and one of the guys there is a mahjong demon.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 423}He said, "Let me test my luck," and challenged me to a game.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 423}If I'd gotten the Peacock, I could've beat him...[n]{f 1 1}
